chat.askDescription: Use the chat to summarize, compare, extract insights, or explore ideas from your attached materials.
chat.readOnly: You have read-only access to this notebook.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Message
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete this question and its corresponding answer from the system and database. This action cannot be undone.

toasts.youtubeFailed: Failed to add video to sources

chat.welcomeMessage: Welcome! I can help you explore and work with the information in this project. You can upload files, build a knowledge base, ask questions about your documents, and get grounded answers based on the content available here. To get started, add files to this chat or project, then ask a question, request a summary, or explore key insights.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: All documents and resources across your projects and notebooks

noMatches.title: No matching resources
noMatches.description: Try adjusting your filters or search query to find what you're looking for.

none.title: No resources yet
none.description: Upload documents to your projects or notebooks to see them here. Resources from shared workspaces will also appear once available.

rename.title: Rename resource
rename.description: Update the resource title shown across Resources and related workspaces.

addSourceDialog.title: Add source
addSourceDialog.tooltip: Add a specific URL or supported source now so it appears in Resources immediately. Some providers support richer enrichment. Unavailable providers are marked Soon.
addSourceDialog.description: Add a URL or supported source so content can appear in Resources.
addSourceDialog.footnote: Supported sources are available now. Others are marked Soon.

content.extractionInProgress: Document extraction is in progress. Extracted text will appear here when processing is complete.

onboarding.heroDescription: Upload your files, build a searchable knowledge base, and get accurate answers powered by retrieval-augmented generation. Perfect for teams who need fast, reliable information retrieval.

upload.title: Upload & Index Documents
upload.description: Upload PDFs, Word files, and text documents. They're automatically indexed for fast, accurate retrieval.

knowledge.title: Multimodal Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Combine text, structured data, and multiple file formats into a centralized knowledge base per project.

rag.title: RAG-Powered Chat
rag.description: Ask questions in natural language. Responses are grounded in your uploaded content for improved accuracy.

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Share projects with team members. Ensure consistent answers from a shared source of truth.

notebooks.title: Organize Insights with Notebooks
notebooks.description: Go beyond Q&A — structure your knowledge, capture findings, and build reusable research workflows.

build.title: Build Research Notebooks
build.description: Organize documents, questions, and sources into focused knowledge workspaces.

save.title: Save and Reuse Insights
save.description: Turn useful answers into notes, refine them, and add them back as reusable sources.

useCases.title: What You Can Do with Researcher
useCases.description: Practical ways to get value from your documents and knowledge.

research.title: Research & Analysis
research.description: Explore papers, reports, specifications, and long documents faster.

learning.title: Learning & Study
learning.description: Turn dense material into clear explanations, summaries, and study notes.

qa.title: Document Q&A
qa.description: Ask questions across your uploaded files and get grounded answers quickly.

organize.title: Knowledge Organization
organize.description: Build reusable notebooks, notes, and source-backed knowledge bases.

newProject.title: Create New Project
newProject.description: Start a new knowledge project to organize your documents and chats.
newProject.name: Project name
newProject.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this project is about. This helps the AI agent provide more relevant and accurate answers...
newProject.descriptionHelp: This description helps the AI understand the project context and provide better answers.

errors.descriptionRequired: Project description is required — it helps the AI provide better answers

shareDialog.viewerHelp: View content, participate in existing chats

toasts.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

uploadDialog.title: Upload Documents
uploadDialog.description: Upload documents to attach to this {{context}}. Files will be analyzed and indexed in the background.
uploadDialog.dropHint: Drop files here or click to browse
uploadDialog.supported: Supported: PDF, DOC/DOCX, CSV/XLS/XLSX, JPG/JPEG/PNG, PPTX, EML/MSG, TXT/TXTX/MD/RTF/XML/JSON/LOG • Max 20 MB

settingsDialog.title: General Settings
settingsDialog.answerFormattingHelp: Rich markdown rendering for AI answers
settingsDialog.chatSuggestionsHelp: Show AI-generated follow-up suggestions in chat
settingsDialog.generationSoundHelp: Play a sound when generation finishes
settingsDialog.agentNotificationsHelp: Get notified when agent actions complete

pricingDialog.title: Choose Your Plan
pricingDialog.subtitle: Select the perfect plan for your needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

features.0: Up to 3 projects and up to 3 notebooks
features.1: 5 document uploads per project or per notebook
Up to 10 projects and up to 10 notebooks
features.2: 10 document uploads per project or per notebook

placeholders.notebookSelect: Select a notebook below, then ask…
placeholders.default: Ask a question about your documents...

notebook.required: Notebook required — select a notebook to ground this prompt.
notebook.missingToast: Select a notebook to ground this prompt

modes.webSearchDesc: Add quick web result snippets to ground this prompt.
modes.researchDesc: Run deep web research for this prompt. Slower, more thorough.
modes.youtubeDesc: Search YouTube videos for this prompt.
modes.notebookDesc: Ground this prompt in a selected notebook's sources.
modes.noNotebooks: No notebooks available. Create one to use this mode.
modes.appliesNext: Applies only to the next message.

chatInput.imageRemainingToast_one: Only {{count}} more image can be attached
chatInput.imageRemainingToast_other: Only {{count}} more images can be attached

documentDashboard.emptyProject: Project documents are available across all chats in this project. Upload documents to enable AI-powered search and analysis.
documentDashboard.emptyChat: Chat documents are attached to this specific chat. Upload documents to provide context for this conversation.
documentDashboard.emptyNotebook: Add documents or linked videos to this notebook to enable AI-powered search and analysis across your sources.

documentUsability.extractedTextHint: Raw text has been extracted from the document
documentUsability.summaryHint: An AI-generated summary of the document content
documentUsability.chunkedHint: Document split into smaller passages for precise retrieval
documentUsability.embeddingsHint: Document prepared for meaning-based search, not only exact keywords
documentUsability.generatedQuestionsHint: Total generated question rows for this document
documentUsability.questionEmbeddingsHint: Question rows with non-null embedding vectors
documentUsability.questionEmbeddingCoverageHint: Percentage of question rows that have embeddings
documentUsability.questionRetrievalHint: Ready: all questions embedded and chunk retrieval ready. Partial: some embeddings missing. Not ready: no questions.
documentUsability.keywordSearchHint: Find documents by exact words and phrases
documentUsability.semanticSearchHint: AI finds relevant passages even when wording differs from your query
documentUsability.hybridRetrievalHint: Combines keyword and semantic search for the best results
documentUsability.usableInGroundedHint: AI answers can reference this document's content for more accurate responses
documentUsability.readyForAiHint: All retrieval stages complete — this document fully supports AI-powered Q&A

planLimits.projectsReached: Plan limit reached for projects. Upgrade to create more.
planLimits.notebooksReached: Plan limit reached for notebooks. Upgrade to create more.
planLimits.documentsReached: Plan limit reached for documents per project or notebook. Upgrade to upload more.
